meaning: A formal decision by a judge or jury that a defendant is not guilty of a crime.
definition: A formal decision by a judge or jury that a defendant is not guilty of a crime.
example: The acquittal meant the defendant was free to go home and could not be tried for the same crime again.
exampleHindi: बरी होने का मतलब था कि प्रतिवादी घर जाने के लिए स्वतंत्र था और उस पर दोबारा उसी अपराध के लिए मुकदमा नहीं चलाया जा सकता था।

meaning: Evidence that is allowed to be presented in court because it is relevant and collected legally.
definition: Evidence that is allowed to be presented in court because it is relevant and collected legally.
example: The judge ruled that the recording was admissible evidence because the police had a proper warrant.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने फैसला सुनाया कि रिकॉर्डिंग स्वीकार्य साक्ष्य थी क्योंकि पुलिस के पास उचित वारंट था।

meaning: A formal request to a higher court to review and change the decision of a lower court because of a mistake.
definition: A formal request to a higher court to review and change the decision of a lower court because of a mistake.
example: The defense team plans to file an appeal, hoping to get a new trial for their client.
exampleHindi: बचाव दल अपने मुवक्किल के लिए एक नया मुकदमा पाने की उम्मीद में अपील दायर करने की योजना बना रहा है।

meaning: A court hearing where a defendant is formally told of the charges against them and enters a plea.
definition: A court hearing where a defendant is formally told of the charges against them and enters a plea.
example: At the arraignment, the suspect pleaded not guilty to the charges of burglary.
exampleHindi: पूछताछ के दौरान, संदिग्ध ने चोरी के आरोपों के लिए दोषी नहीं होने का अनुरोध किया।

meaning: An official who keeps order in the courtroom, guards prisoners, and helps the judge and jury.
definition: An official who keeps order in the courtroom, guards prisoners, and helps the judge and jury.
example: The bailiff asked everyone in the courtroom to stand as the judge entered.
exampleHindi: जज के प्रवेश करते ही जमानतदार ने अदालत कक्ष में मौजूद सभी लोगों को खड़े होने के लिए कहा।

meaning: The high standard of proof required to convict someone in a criminal trial, meaning there must be no logical doubt of guilt.
definition: The high standard of proof required to convict someone in a criminal trial, meaning there must be no logical doubt of guilt.
example: The jury was instructed to convict the defendant only if his guilt was proven beyond a reasonable doubt.
exampleHindi: जूरी को निर्देश दिया गया कि प्रतिवादी को तभी दोषी ठहराया जाए जब उसका अपराध उचित संदेह से परे साबित हो जाए।

meaning: A written document prepared by a lawyer to explain their side of the case and convince the judge.
definition: A written document prepared by a lawyer to explain their side of the case and convince the judge.
example: The defense attorney submitted a detailed brief explaining why the charges should be dropped.
exampleHindi: बचाव पक्ष के वकील ने एक विस्तृत विवरण प्रस्तुत किया जिसमें बताया गया कि आरोप क्यों हटाये जाने चाहिए।

meaning: The act of disobeying or showing disrespect toward the authority of a court of law.
definition: The act of disobeying or showing disrespect toward the authority of a court of law.
example: The judge warned the shouting spectator that she would be charged with contempt of court if she did not quiet down.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने चिल्लाते हुए दर्शक को चेतावनी दी कि यदि वह शांत नहीं हुई तो उस पर अदालत की अवमानना ​​का आरोप लगाया जाएगा।

meaning: A formal decision by a judge or jury that a defendant is guilty of a crime.
definition: A firmly held belief or opinion.
example: His previous conviction for theft made it difficult for him to find a job after prison.
exampleHindi: चोरी के आरोप में उसकी पिछली सजा के कारण जेल जाने के बाद उसके लिए नौकरी ढूंढना मुश्किल हो गया था।

meaning: A person who types everything that is said during a trial to create an official written record.
definition: A person who types everything that is said during a trial to create an official written record.
example: The court reporter typed quickly on a special machine to record the witness's testimony.
exampleHindi: अदालत के रिपोर्टर ने गवाह की गवाही रिकॉर्ड करने के लिए एक विशेष मशीन पर तुरंत टाइप किया।

meaning: The questioning of an opposing witness in court to test the truthfulness or accuracy of their statements.
definition: The questioning of an opposing witness in court to test the truthfulness or accuracy of their statements.
example: During cross-examination, the prosecutor pointed out several contradictions in the witness's story.
exampleHindi: जिरह के दौरान, अभियोजक ने गवाह की कहानी में कई विरोधाभासों की ओर इशारा किया।

meaning: The person or group being accused of a crime or being sued in a court of law.
definition: The person or group being accused of a crime or being sued in a court of law.
example: The defendant stood up when the judge entered the courtroom to begin the trial.
exampleHindi: जब न्यायाधीश सुनवाई शुरू करने के लिए अदालत कक्ष में दाखिल हुए तो प्रतिवादी खड़ा हो गया।

meaning: The lawyer who represents and defends the accused person (defendant) in court.
definition: The lawyer who represents and defends the accused person (defendant) in court.
example: The defense attorney argued that the evidence against his client was too weak to prove guilt.
exampleHindi: बचाव पक्ष के वकील ने तर्क दिया कि उनके मुवक्किल के ख़िलाफ़ सबूत अपराध साबित करने के लिए बहुत कमज़ोर थे।

meaning: The process of giving sworn out-of-court oral testimony, which is recorded for use in a trial.
definition: The transition in which gas transforms into solid.
example: Before the trial began, the witness sat down for a deposition with the defense lawyers.
exampleHindi: मुक़दमा शुरू होने से पहले, गवाह बचाव पक्ष के वकीलों के साथ गवाही के लिए बैठा।

meaning: A meeting in court, usually shorter and less formal than a trial, to resolve specific legal points.
definition: A meeting in court, usually shorter and less formal than a trial, to resolve specific legal points.
example: The judge scheduled a bail hearing to decide if the suspect could leave jail before the trial.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने यह तय करने के लिए जमानत पर सुनवाई निर्धारित की कि क्या संदिग्ध मुकदमे से पहले जेल छोड़ सकता है।

meaning: Information received from other people that cannot be proven; gossip or rumors, which are usually not allowed as evidence in court.
definition: information received from other people that one cannot adequately substantiate; rumor.
example: The witness's statement was dismissed as hearsay because she only heard about the fight from her sister.
exampleHindi: गवाह के बयान को अफवाह बताकर खारिज कर दिया गया क्योंकि उसने लड़ाई के बारे में केवल अपनी बहन से सुना था।

meaning: A jury that cannot agree on a verdict after a long period of discussion, resulting in a mistrial.
definition: A jury that cannot agree on a verdict after a long period of discussion, resulting in a mistrial.
example: The case ended in a hung jury because two jurors refused to vote guilty.
exampleHindi: मामला त्रिशंकु जूरी में समाप्त हुआ क्योंकि दो जूरी सदस्यों ने दोषी को वोट देने से इनकार कर दिया।

meaning: A formal written accusation charging a person with a serious crime, usually issued by a grand jury.
definition: A formal written accusation charging a person with a serious crime, usually issued by a grand jury.
example: The grand jury handed down an indictment charging the politician with fraud.
exampleHindi: ग्रैंड जूरी ने राजनेता पर धोखाधड़ी का आरोप लगाते हुए अभियोग सुनाया।

meaning: A public official appointed to decide cases in a court of law and ensure trials are conducted fairly.
definition: To form an opinion or conclusion about something
example: The judge listened to arguments from both sides before making a final decision.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने अंतिम निर्णय लेने से पहले दोनों पक्षों की दलीलें सुनीं।

meaning: The official power or authority of a court or police force to make legal decisions and judgments in a specific area.
definition: The official power or authority of a court or police force to make legal decisions and judgments in a specific area.
example: The local police did not have jurisdiction over crimes committed in the neighboring state.
exampleHindi: पड़ोसी राज्य में होने वाले अपराधों पर स्थानीय पुलिस का अधिकार क्षेत्र नहीं था।

meaning: The study or philosophy of law, including the principles on which legal systems are built.
definition: The study or philosophy of law, including the principles on which legal systems are built.
example: In law school, students take courses in jurisprudence to understand the history of legal systems.
exampleHindi: लॉ स्कूल में, छात्र कानूनी प्रणालियों के इतिहास को समझने के लिए न्यायशास्त्र में पाठ्यक्रम लेते हैं।

meaning: A group of ordinary citizens chosen to listen to the evidence in a trial and decide if the defendant is guilty or innocent.
definition: A group of ordinary citizens chosen to listen to the evidence in a trial and decide if the defendant is guilty or innocent.
example: The jury deliberated for three days before reaching a unanimous verdict of not guilty.
exampleHindi: जूरी ने दोषी नहीं होने के सर्वसम्मत फैसले पर पहुंचने से पहले तीन दिनों तक विचार-विमर्श किया।

meaning: A legal process in which a person or group sues another in court to resolve a dispute or seek money.
definition: A legal process in which a person or group sues another in court to resolve a dispute or seek money.
example: The company settled the lawsuit out of court to avoid bad publicity and expensive legal fees.
exampleHindi: कंपनी ने खराब प्रचार और महंगी कानूनी फीस से बचने के लिए मुकदमे को अदालत के बाहर ही सुलझा लिया।

meaning: The process of taking a case to a court of law so that a judge can decide the dispute.
definition: The process of taking a case to a court of law so that a judge can decide the dispute.
example: After months of litigation, the two business partners finally resolved their contract disagreement.
exampleHindi: महीनों की मुकदमेबाजी के बाद, अंततः दोनों व्यापारिक साझेदारों ने अपने अनुबंध संबंधी असहमति को सुलझा लिया।

meaning: A trial that is declared invalid or cancelled because of a serious error, misconduct, or a hung jury.
definition: A trial that is declared invalid or cancelled because of a serious error, misconduct, or a hung jury.
example: The judge declared a mistrial after a juror was caught talking to the defendant's family.
exampleHindi: एक जूरी सदस्य को प्रतिवादी के परिवार से बात करते हुए पकड़े जाने के बाद न्यायाधीश ने गलत मुकदमे की घोषणा की।

meaning: A formal protest raised by a lawyer in court against a question or evidence presented by the other side.
definition: A formal protest raised by a lawyer in court against a question or evidence presented by the other side.
example: 'Objection, Your Honor!' said the lawyer, arguing that the question was irrelevant to the case.
exampleHindi: 'आपत्ति, माननीय!' वकील ने तर्क देते हुए कहा कि यह प्रश्न मामले के लिए अप्रासंगिक है।

meaning: A decision by a judge to reject a lawyer's objection and allow the questioning or evidence to continue.
definition: A decision by a judge to reject a lawyer's objection and allow the questioning or evidence to continue.
example: The judge overruled the objection, stating that the witness had to answer the prosecutor's question.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने यह कहते हुए आपत्ति को खारिज कर दिया कि गवाह को अभियोजक के प्रश्न का उत्तर देना होगा।

meaning: The person or group who starts a lawsuit in a court of law against someone else.
definition: The person or group who starts a lawsuit in a court of law against someone else.
example: The plaintiff sued the company for damages after slipping on their wet lobby floor.
exampleHindi: वादी ने लॉबी के गीले फर्श पर फिसलने के बाद कंपनी पर हर्जाने के लिए मुकदमा दायर किया।

meaning: A formal statement made in court by a defendant, stating whether they are guilty or not guilty.
definition: A formal statement made in court by a defendant, stating whether they are guilty or not guilty.
example: The defendant entered a plea of not guilty during his first appearance in court.
exampleHindi: प्रतिवादी ने अदालत में अपनी पहली उपस्थिति के दौरान दोषी न होने की दलील दी।

meaning: An agreement where the defendant pleads guilty to a lesser charge in exchange for a lighter sentence.
definition: An agreement where the defendant pleads guilty to a lesser charge in exchange for a lighter sentence.
example: The defendant accepted a plea bargain, pleading guilty to theft to avoid a longer trial.
exampleHindi: प्रतिवादी ने लंबी सुनवाई से बचने के लिए चोरी का दोषी मानते हुए एक दलील स्वीकार कर ली।

meaning: An earlier court decision that is used as a guide or rule for future similar cases.
definition: An earlier court decision that is used as a guide or rule for future similar cases.
example: The Supreme Court's ruling set a precedent that will affect similar cases for decades.
exampleHindi: सुप्रीम कोर्ट के फैसले ने एक मिसाल कायम की है जो दशकों तक इसी तरह के मामलों को प्रभावित करेगी।

meaning: The lawyer who represents the government and tries to prove that the accused person is guilty.
definition: The lawyer who represents the government and tries to prove that the accused person is guilty.
example: The prosecutor presented several witnesses to prove that the defendant was at the scene of the crime.
exampleHindi: अभियोजक ने यह साबित करने के लिए कई गवाह पेश किए कि प्रतिवादी अपराध स्थल पर था।

meaning: A legal order requiring a person to appear in court as a witness or to present documents.
definition: A legal order requiring a person to appear in court as a witness or to present documents.
example: She received a subpoena in the mail requiring her to testify about the car accident next month.
exampleHindi: उसे मेल में एक सम्मन प्राप्त हुआ जिसमें उसे अगले महीने कार दुर्घटना के बारे में गवाही देने के लिए कहा गया।

meaning: A decision by a judge to agree with a lawyer's objection and stop the line of questioning or evidence.
definition: A decision by a judge to agree with a lawyer's objection and stop the line of questioning or evidence.
example: The judge sustained the objection and told the lawyer to ask a different question.
exampleHindi: न्यायाधीश ने आपत्ति बरकरार रखी और वकील से एक अलग प्रश्न पूछने को कहा।

meaning: The formal statements made by a witness under oath in a court of law.
definition: The formal statements made by a witness under oath in a court of law.
example: The victim's emotional testimony convinced the jury that the defendant was guilty.
exampleHindi: पीड़िता की भावनात्मक गवाही ने जूरी को आश्वस्त किया कि प्रतिवादी दोषी था।

meaning: A formal meeting in a court of law to hear evidence and decide a case.
definition: A formal meeting in a court of law to hear evidence and decide a case.
example: The high-profile trial lasted for three weeks and was broadcast on national television.
exampleHindi: हाई-प्रोफाइल मुकदमा तीन सप्ताह तक चला और राष्ट्रीय टेलीविजन पर प्रसारित किया गया।

meaning: The final decision made by a jury or judge at the end of a trial, stating whether the defendant is guilty or innocent.
definition: The final decision made by a jury or judge at the end of a trial, stating whether the defendant is guilty or innocent.
example: The crowd gathered outside the courthouse to wait for the jury's verdict.
exampleHindi: जूरी के फैसले का इंतजार करने के लिए अदालत के बाहर भीड़ जमा हो गई।
